original: A surprisingly light shirt made of interwoven layers of woven spinarran filament mail and ballistic fiber. Almost completely bulletproof and resistant to heat. Mainly used as concealed armor or woven into clothing, it is the most basic of spinarran armor. Under the protective layers is a soft downy fur to help keep you warm.
context: <<POS:05900636>> ="a weavemail shirt",e.tooltip='A surprisingly light shirt made of interwoven layers of wove'
